home.heroSubtitle: Dukurikiranira ibirori by'ingenzi — DOTE, ubukwe, amavuko, ijanisha, ubukure n'ibirori by'amasosiyete mu Rwanda rwose.
home.platformDesc: NY Entertainment Rwanda ni ikigo cy'umwuga gifite uburambe mu kwerekana ibirori nk'ubukwe, DOTE, amavuko, ijanisha, ubukure n'ibirori by'amasosiyete mu turere 30 tw'u Rwanda.
home.platformDesc2: Kuva mu mashusho ya cinematique, amashusho ya drone, kugeza ku kwerekana ibirori ku mbuga nkoranyambaga — dutanga serivisi zuzuye zerekana ibihe byawe by'ingenzi.
home.searchAcross: Shakisha amashusho, inyandiko, abahanzi, abashakanye n'ibirori
home.servicesDesc: Ibintu byose ukeneye kugirango ube n'ibirori byiza
home.noVideosYet: Nta mashusho y'ubu. Amashusho yashyizweho n'abashakanye n'abahanzi azagaragara hano.
home.supportImpactText: "Uruhare rwawe rutabafasha abashakanye kubika ibihe byabo by'ingenzi no kunguka mu nkuru z'urukundo rwabo. Buri rutangira rugana mu nkunga y'abashakanye n'imiryango yabo."
home.downloadAppDesc: Bizaza vuba kuri Android na iOS
home.step4Desc: Gukata amashusho mu buryo bwa cinematique
home.premiumContentDesc: Iyandikishe ubone amashusho y'ubukwe y'agaciro, amashusho yose n'ibindi by'inyuma.
home.becomeFeaturedCoupleDesc: Sangiza inkuru yawe, ubone urupapuro rwawe, kandi uzingukire ku mashusho ya premium.
home.becomeCreatorDesc: Yerekana akazi kawe, ubone ibyo gukora binyuze kuri platform, uzingukire ku birori.
home.stayUpdatedDesc: Iyandikishe ubone amakuru ku birori bishya, amashusho n'ibyohatanga
home.getInTouchDesc: Turi gake gufata ikirori kyawe gikurikira
home.post1Excerpt: Discover the hottest wedding styles taking over Kigali this season.
home.post2Title: How to Plan Your DOTE Ceremony
home.post2Excerpt: Everything you need to know about Rwanda's beautiful introduction ceremony.
home.post3Title: Behind the Lens: Our Camera Gear
home.post3Excerpt: A look at the professional equipment we use to capture your moments.
home.review1: Amazing! The video captured every emotion perfectly. We cry every time we watch it.
home.review2: Beautiful tribute for our father. They preserved his memory with such dignity.
home.review3: The birthday video was incredible! Everyone was blown away by the quality.
home.cinematicQualityDesc: Every event filmed like a movie — rich colors, smooth motion
home.fastDeliveryDesc: Highlight reels within 48 hours, full video in 2–4 weeks
home.modernEquipmentDesc: 4K cameras, gimbals, pro lighting & audio gear
home.allRwandaDesc: We travel to all 30 districts — no event too far
home.flexiblePricingDesc: Negotiable packages — we work within your budget
home.faq1a: DOTE is Rwanda's traditional introduction ceremony where the groom's family formally requests the bride's hand in marriage, with gift presentation, family speeches, and cultural dances.
home.faq2q: How do I book an event?
home.faq2a: Click 'Book Event Now' on any section. Choose your event type, fill in details, and submit. Our team reviews within 24 hours and contacts you with pricing.
home.faq3a: Highlight reels: 48 hours. Full videos: 2–4 weeks depending on event size and package selected.
home.faq4q: Do you cover events outside Kigali?
home.faq4a: Yes! We cover all 30 districts of Rwanda. Travel costs may apply for distant locations.
home.faq5q: Can I pay a deposit first?
home.faq5a: Yes. A deposit is required to confirm your booking. Full payment is completed after admin approval and before the event date.
home.faq6q: What's included in the Full Package?
home.faq6a: Complete DOTE, Church, and Reception coverage, drone shots, two videographers, same-day highlight reel, and full cinematic film.

about.title: Ibyacu
about.subtitle: Ikigo Kinyarwanda Kivuga Ibirori
about.ourStoryText: NY Entertainment Rwanda yatangijwe ifite intego yo kubika ibihe byiza by'u Rwanda binyuze mu mashusho ya cinematique. Ibyatangiye nk'ishyaka ryo gufata amashusho y'ubukwe byakuze bikaba serivisi zuzuye z'ibirori bikubiyemo DOTE, amavuko, ijanisha, ubukure n'ibirori by'amasosiyete mu turere 30 tw'u Rwanda.
about.ourStoryText2: Twizera ko buri kirori gifite inkuru yacyo. Itsinda ryacu rifite ubuhanga mu mashusho, amafoto n'ubugeni bukora hamwe kugirango barebe amashusho azabikwa n'imiryango mu bisekuruza.
about.ourMissionText: Gutanga serivisi z'ibirori zo mu rwego rw'isi zihimbara umuco nyarwanda, zibika amateka y'imiryango, kandi ziha abahanzi, abashakanye n'abacuruzi ubushobozi binyuze mu kubara inkuru ziza.
about.teamLeadDesc: Afite uburambe bwo hejuru y'imyaka 10 mu mashusho y'ibirori, Abel ayobora ikirenga cyacu.
about.teamCreativeDesc: Ahatana ubuhanga mu mikorere yose, afite urukundo rwo kubara inkuru.
about.teamEditorDesc: Akora amashusho ya cinematique afata ibyiyumvo by'ibirori byose.
about.whyChooseUsDesc: Duhuza ubuhanga n'umuco kugirango turebe amashusho afite agaciro.
about.missionText: Kubika buri nkuru y'urukundo binyuze mu mashusho ya cinematique, kugirango buri mubakwa abone amashusho meza ku giciro gihagaze.
about.leaderBio1: Umuyobozi ufite uburambe bwo hejuru y'imyaka 8 mu inganda z'ubuhanga. Yves yashinze NY Entertainment Rwanda ifite intego yo guhindura uburyo bwo kubara inkuru z'ubukwe mu Rwanda.
about.leaderBio2: Umuhanga mu bugeni n'ubukorikori ushinzwe uburyo platform ikora. Abel ahakora ko buri mubakwa abona uburyo bwiza.
about.teamSubtitle: Menya abakozi b'inyuma ya NY Entertainment Rwanda
about.teamBio1: Umuhanga mu kubara inkuru n'ubuyobozi bw'amashusho y'ubukwe.
about.teamBio2: Umugenzuzi w'amashusho ufite ubuhanga mu gukata amashusho y'ubukwe.
about.teamBio3: Ahakora ko buri mubakwa abona serivisi nziza.
about.teamBio4: Umuhanga mu gufata amashusho afata ibyiyumvo.
about.teamBio5: Ushinzwe gukwirakwiza no guhuza n'abashakanye mu Rwanda.
about.storyText1: NY Entertainment Rwanda yatangijwe mu 2020 ifite intego yo guha buri mubakwa amashusho meza ku giciro gihagaze. Turi i Kamonyi, twakwiye gukora n'abashakanye mu turere twose tw'u Rwanda.
about.storyText2: Igituma dutandukanye? Twizera ko buri nkuru y'urukundo itandukanye kandi ikwiriye kubarwa neza. Itsinda ryacu rifite ubuhanga n'urukundo rwo kubara inkuru.

contact.title: Twandikire
contact.subtitle: Twandikire muri NY Entertainment Rwanda
contact.subject: Ikibazo
contact.faq1q: Nakora bite ngo mbike amafoto y'ubukwe?
contact.faq1a: Kanda ku rupapuro rwo kubika, hitamo porogaramu, itariki, hanyuma ohereze. Tuzakubwira mu masaha 24.
contact.faq2a: Dufite DOTE, Church Wedding, Reception, na Full Wedding.
contact.faq3a: Abamararungu ni ababyinnyi b'umuco bakora mu bukwe. Urashobora kubiyandikisha.
contact.faq4q: Murakora mu turere twose tw'u Rwanda?
contact.faq4a: Yego, dukora mu turere 30. Amafaranga yo kugenda ashobora gukenerwa.
contact.faq5q: Gukata amashusho bifata igihe kingana iki?

clientDashboard.title: Akagari k'Umukiriya
clientDashboard.paymentNote: 💡 Kwishyura bikorwa nyuma y'uko admin yemeje. Tuzakubwira kuri WhatsApp.

privacy.title: Amateka y'Ibanga
privacy.subtitle: Uko turinda amakuru yawe
privacy.intro: Kuri NY Entertainment Rwanda, turita cyane ku banga ryawe. Iyi politiki isobanura uko dukusanya, dukoresha, kandi turinda amakuru yawe.
privacy.section1Text: Dukusanya amakuru utanga nk'izina ryawe, imeri, telefone, n'ibintu byose ushyira kuri platform. Dukusanya n'amakuru yo gukoresha kugirango duteza imbere serivisi zacu.
privacy.section2Text: Dukoresha amakuru yawe kugirango dutange kandi duteza imbere serivisi zacu, tuvugane nawe, dukore ibyo wishyura, kandi tuguteze imbere uko ukoresha.
privacy.section3Text: Dushyiraho ingamba z'umutekano kugirango turinde amakuru yawe. Ariko, nta buryo bwo kohereza amakuru kuri Internet bufite umutekano 100%.
privacy.section4Text: Ufite uburenganzira bwo kubona, guhindura, cyangwa gusiba amakuru yawe igihe icyo aricyo cyose. Twandikire kugirango tugufashe.
privacy.section5Text: Dukoresha cookies kugirango duteze imbere uko ukoresha platform. Urashobora guhagarika cookies muri browser yawe.
privacy.section6Text: Niba ufite ikibazo kuri iyi politiki, twandikire kuri nyentertainmentrwanda@gmail.com

terms.title: Amategeko
terms.subtitle: Soma amategeko yacu
terms.intro: Murakaza neza kuri NY Entertainment Rwanda. Mu gukoresha platform yacu, uremera amategeko. Niba utaremera, ntugakoreshe serivisi zacu.
terms.section1Text: Mu gukora konti cyangwa gukoresha serivisi zacu, uremera amategeko. Dushobora guhindura amategeko igihe cyose.
terms.section2Text: NY Entertainment Rwanda itanga serivisi z'umwuga zirimo:
terms.section3Text: Kubika bikurikira ubushobozi. Hari aho usabwa kwishyura igihombo. Ibiciro biraganirwaho kandi bizashyirwa mu nyandiko.
terms.paymentNote: Kwishyura byose bigomba kurangira mbere y'ikirori.
terms.section4Text: Niba ushaka guhagarika ikirori, amategeko ni aya:
terms.responsibility3: Kureba ko itsinda ryacu rihabwa ahantu
terms.section6Text: Dufite uburenganzira bwo guhagarika serivisi niba urenganya amategeko.
terms.section7Text: NY Entertainment Rwanda irashobora guhindura amategeko igihe cyose.

search.noResultsDesc: Gerageza guhindura uko ushakisha cyangwa reba ibyiciro byacu.

booking.note: 📌 Menya: Urashobora kubika ikirori kimwe gusa. Niba ushaka byinshi, ohereza buri kimwe.
booking.notesPlaceholder: Ibintu by'ingenzi, ibyo usaba, cyangwa ibindi...
booking.tip: Nyuma yo kohereza, itsinda ryacu rizasuzuma ikirori cyawe mu masaha 24. Tuzakubwira ibiciro n'uko wishyura.
booking.whatsNextDesc: Itsinda ryacu rizasuzuma ikirori cyawe mu masaha 24. Tuzakubwira kuri imeri cyangwa telefone.
